query:
INSERT INTO activity
               (occurred_at, verb, actor_user_id, target_student_id, syllabus_id)
           SELECT
               sa.assigned_at,
               'syllabus_assigned',
               COALESCE(sa.assigned_by_id, sa.student_id),
               sa.student_id,
               sa.syllabus_id
           FROM syllabus_assignments sa
